song.title: It's So Easy
song.author: Kelly Scalletta
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics: [V1] .D A G A It's so easy to love the Lord, .D A G D It's so easy to love the Lord. .D A G A It's so easy to love the Lord, .D A G D It's so easy to love the Lord. [C] .D A It's so easy, it's so easy - Amen! .D A It's so easy, it's so easy - love Him! .D A It's so easy, it's so easy - Amen! .D A It's so easy, it's so easy - love Him! .D A G D It's so easy to love the Lord! [V2] When we call on Him we see Just how beautiful is He. Just one look, it is enough For us all to fall in love. [V3] Nothing else I need to do, Just to stop and look anew. Swells my heart with love divine, When His spirit flows in mine. [V4] There's no need to dwell on sin. In his blood we've entered in. Now in spirit we are free To enjoy reality! [V5] Crazy love is filling me! I don't care what I will be! Only one thing matters still, Lord e'en more my spirit fill!
